div1.entryFree:
Lighten, 1) to illuminate, to enlighten: the Lord l. thee, H4B II, 1, 208. a gem to l. all this isle, H8 II, 3, 79. a precious ring that --s all the hole, Tit. II, 3, 227.
2) to flash: like the lightning, which doth cease to be ere one can say 'It --s,' Rom. II, 2, 120. Caes. I, 3, 74. With an accus. denoting the effect: his eye --s forth controlling majesty, R2 III, 3, 69.
